title: elaeocarpus sublucidus
intro: Elaeocarpus sublucidus is a plant species native to Malaysia, belonging to the Elaeocarpaceae family, commonly known as the blueberry ash or blue olive tree. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, derived from its leaves and fruits. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus sublucidus include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antidiarrheal agent. In traditional Malaysian medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
